subject: Quick Question
body:
Hi jeffrey,
 
I’m hoping you can point me in the right direction. I’m emailing to let you know that Citrix ShareFile is finding more ways to help healthcare providers get connected to patient information quickly and securely. ShareFile now offers:



 - Medical Imaging <http://pages.sharefile.com/Y07eB1ahh00P9020vML0kPu>: Manage patient images in one place. No more CDs.
 - Secure Remote Access <http://pages.sharefile.com/f00B71v09e02uM0PLhP4h0e>: Access desktop files and applications from anywhere while maintaining HIPAA compliance.
 - Secure Electronic Faxing <http://pages.sharefile.com/m200h500e1P7uvh9MBf0LP0>: Send faxes securely with our Sfax integration.


Would you be the right person to speak with or is there someone else you would recommend?

Thanks,

Bethany Longley
Director, Corporate Sales
ShareFile Sales Mgmt & Ops



120 South West Street | Raleigh, NC 27603

bethany@sf-email.sharefile.com
www.ShareFile.com <http://pages.sharefile.com/dc/6-MALPEjw79s-xMyvxHiGRjQugRw8mtZ0Z4mXkJJDkSvlHvFuQwh9R49ybmA_oO9Norbww1cSkPWBIDq1D6Cgw==/LPe0PM00u1hB2L79h0v070h> | www.citrix.com <http://pages.sharefile.com/v2e90hBi07vPLh8uM00P001>

ShareFile is a division of Citrix that provides an easy, professional and secure file transfer solution used by more than 45,000 businesses and over 16 million people worldwide.

This email was sent to jeeproject@yahoo.com. If you no longer wish to receive these emails you may update your email preferences here: http://sf-mktg-pages.sharefile.com/Email-Preference-Center.html?mkt_unsubscribe=1&mkt_tok=eyJpIjoiTWpNell6VXpNelUyTXpabSIsInQiOiJpM00vTFZmaTEvR1FpVlZoQjNHSFd4ckNpbnJndzZFWEFmaXZ6THAxYUx6Rmd1akhyZ3cwL1Y0eE9ocGsrRy9nM3Fwem8wOXJ5VndSRFR1UkxMUUh3OC9qeDBaMFo3MlhaOU84WnROSVNiRGl1RVJYRjg3WHluZlR0VDhFNnA2NSJ9.
